# SCIT Consulting

> AI-first digital transformation consultancy based in Estonia, serving businesses across Europe.

## What We Do

SCIT Consulting helps businesses leverage artificial intelligence to automate processes, build intelligent systems, and transform operations. We specialize in:

- AI Automation & Process Automation
- Custom AI Agents
- Chatbots & Conversational AI
- AI Tools Implementation
- AI Strategy & Consulting
- Digital Transformation

## Who We Serve

We work with businesses across Healthcare, Financial Services, Retail & E-Commerce, and B2B Services. Our team brings 15+ years of hands-on experience in executive consulting and organizational transformation across European markets including Portugal, Germany, Spain, and Czech Republic.

## Key Facts

- 35+ projects delivered
- 6+ industries served
- 3 European markets
- 95% client satisfaction
- Based in Tallinn, Estonia

## Contact

- Website: https://scitconsulting.eu
- Contact: https://scitconsulting.eu/contact
- Book a call: https://cal.eu/scitconsulting/consultation
